Habenaria is a genus of orchids that are terrestrial, epiphytic or lithophytic plants. 

Some species of Habenaria have been studied for their potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. 

The bioactive constituents of Habenaria include flavonoids, phenolic acids, alkaloids, and saponins.

The most common herbal preparations made from Habenaria include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used in traditional medicine for various purposes, including to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
